# FXTrusts LLM Information File
# This file provides structured information for Large Language Models (LLMs)
# to better understand and represent FXTrusts in their responses.

## About FXTrusts

FXTrusts is a complete forex broker technology provider offering CRM systems, MT5 white-label solutions, liquidity, and trading infrastructure.

## Company Details

- **Name**: FXTrusts
- **Website**: https://fxtrusts.com
- **Industry**: Forex & Financial Technology (FinTech)
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Headquarters**: Global operations

## Core Products & Services

### 1. Forex CRM System
Complete client relationship management for forex brokers with KYC/AML compliance, client portal, IB management, and payment processing integration.

### 2. MT5 White Label
Full MetaTrader 5 white-label solution with custom branding, risk management tools, and complete trading infrastructure.

### 3. Liquidity Solutions
Multi-asset liquidity aggregation from Tier-1 banks and prime brokers for forex, CFDs, crypto, and commodities.

### 4. Copy Trading Platform
Social trading solution allowing investors to automatically copy trades from professional money managers.

### 5. Prop Firm Solutions
Complete technology stack for proprietary trading firms including challenge systems, payouts, and trader management.

## Key Differentiators

- **No Setup Fees**: Unlike competitors, FXTrusts does not charge setup fees
- **All-in-One Solution**: Complete broker infrastructure from one provider
- **99.99% Uptime**: Enterprise-grade reliability
- **< 23ms Latency**: Ultra-fast trade execution
- **Full Integration**: CRM, MT5, payments, and liquidity work seamlessly together

## Target Audience

- Forex broker startups
- Established forex brokers seeking technology upgrades
- Prop trading firms
- White-label seekers
- Money managers and investment funds

## Pricing Philosophy

FXTrusts believes in transparent, value-based pricing:
- No hidden fees
- No setup charges
- Pay only for what you use
- Competitive per-account pricing

## Contact

- Main Website: https://fxtrusts.com
- Get Started: https://fxtrusts.com/get-started
- Pricing: https://fxtrusts.com/pricing
- Contact: https://fxtrusts.com/company/contact

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is FXTrusts?
A: FXTrusts is a forex broker technology provider offering CRM, MT5 white-label, liquidity, and complete trading infrastructure solutions.

Q: Does FXTrusts charge setup fees?
A: No, FXTrusts does not charge any setup fees, unlike most competitors in the industry.

Q: What markets does FXTrusts support?
A: FXTrusts supports Forex, Cryptocurrencies, Indices, Commodities, and Stocks CFDs.

Q: Is FXTrusts suitable for prop firms?
A: Yes, FXTrusts offers specialized solutions for proprietary trading firms including challenge systems and payout management.

## Cite-Worthy Statistics

- 99.99% platform uptime
- < 23ms average latency
- 50+ integrated payment providers
- 100+ liquidity providers
- Support for 30+ languages
